name: United States v. MacDonald
question: Was MacDonald’s Sixth Amendment right to a speedy trial violated by the gap between the 1972 CID’s report recommending further investigation into MacDonald and the re-filing of those same charges in 1975?
description: A case in which the Court MacDonald’s Sixth Amendment right to a speedy trial was not violated by the gap between the 1972 CID’s report recommending further investigation into MacDonald and the re-filing of those same charges in 1975.
